mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ul.total_exp DESC) AS `rank`, ul.user_id AS userId, su.nickname AS nickname, su.avatar AS avatar, ul.level AS level, ul.total_exp AS totalExp FROM biz_user_level ul LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ul.user_id = su.user_id ORDER BY ul.total_exp DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(uc.learn_count), 0) DESC) AS `rank`, ul.user_id AS userId, su.nickname AS nickname, su.avatar AS avatar, ul.level AS level, COALESCE(SUM(uc.learn_count), 0) AS weekLearnCount FROM biz_user_level ul LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ul.user_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN biz_user_daily_count uc ON ul.user_id = uc.user_id AND uc.count_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) GROUP BY ul.user_id, su.nickname, su.avatar, ul.level ORDER BY weekLearnCount DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ls.current_streak DESC) AS `rank`, ul.user_id AS userId, su.nickname AS nickname, su.avatar AS avatar, ul.level AS level, ls.current_streak AS currentStreak FROM biz_user_level ul LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ul.user_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN biz_learning_streak ls ON ul.user_id = ls.user_id ORDER BY ls.current_streak DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM biz_user_daily_count WHERE count_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_learning_streak WHERE current_streak > 0

SELECT ul.user_id AS userId, su.nickname AS nickname, su.avatar AS avatar, ul.level AS level, ul.total_exp AS totalExp, -- 总排名 (SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 FROM biz_user_level WHERE total_exp > ul.total_exp) AS `rank`, -- 本周学习数 (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(learn_count), 0) FROM biz_user_daily_count WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND count_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY)) AS weekLearnCount, -- 周排名 (SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 FROM ( SELECT user_id, SUM(learn_count) AS week_total FROM biz_user_daily_count WHERE count_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) GROUP BY user_id HAVING week_total > (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(learn_count), 0) FROM biz_user_daily_count WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND count_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY)) ) tmp) AS weekRank, -- 连续天数 (SELECT current_streak FROM biz_learning_streak WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AS currentStreak, -- 连击排名 (SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 FROM biz_learning_streak WHERE current_streak > (SELECT COALESCE(current_streak, 0) FROM biz_learning_streak WHERE user_id = #{userId})) AS streakRank FROM biz_user_level ul LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ul.user_id = su.user_id WHERE ul.user_id = #{userId}
